intro: Pack your parasol, it's time for an adventure!
description:
Join Nico, a little girl clad in all pink and armed with an extraordinary parasol, on a dangerous yet colorful journey through space!

From the arcade legends, TAITO, experience this formerly Japan-exclusive 2D action jump & run filled with charm and cartoonish delight on modern consoles for the very first time! Reminiscent of the parasol from Parasol Stars: Bubble Bobble III, this yellow parasol will become your favorite accessory and best weapon. Use it to take down a wild mix of enemies that come straight out of a toybox!

Whether it's slashing combos, shooting, jumping off platforms, gliding, or floating, Nico and her parasol have an arsenal of moves that are as varied as her colorful foes. Don’t forget to use the parasol for protection—and we don’t mean against the sun! Defend, parry, and reflect the enemy projectiles in up to 8 directions!

Tackle the challenge of 28 stages spread across multiple paths. With each playthrough, choose a new journey through the universe of Spica! 

Featuring:
• Straight from the Arcades: Experience an arcade classic transported to consoles for the very first time!
• A Kaleidoscope of Colors: Feast your eyes on the uniquely cute and colorful 2D graphics.
• Parasol Action: Show off your extensive combat skills with the parasol!
• Through the Universe: Choose your own journey across the 28 colorful stages of Spica.
• Legendary Arcade-inspired Soundtrack: Vibe to the rhythm of ZUNTATA’s funky tunes!

Embark on this adventure to save Spica from cute but lethal enemies... And don’t forget to pack your parasol!!
